evidence.claim: [FZD7] Frizzled class receptor 7 / WNT receptor — VERDICT: PLAUSIBLE PARTIAL RESCUE (context-dependent; potentially worsening via WNT). FZD7 activates Wnt->Dvl->beta-catenin and Wnt->PI3K->mTOR; Wnt/mTOR crosstalk is bidirectional, so FZD7 knockdown could partially dampen mTOR drive in some contexts but may also worsen.
